mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.account, c.platform_type as platformType, c.country_name as countryName, c.followers_num as followersNum, b.is_cooperated as isCooperated FROM `store_celebrity_counselor_change_detail` a LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_counselor_change_log b ON a.change_log_id = b.id LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_private c ON a.celebrity_private_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{changeDetail.changeLogId} GROUP BY c.id
